name: Zanzibar Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 Clove garlic - crushed thru a press
recipeInstructions:
1. Season chicken with cinnamon, garlic, salt, and pepper. In a large frying pan, heat oil over medium-high heat. Add chicken, in batches if necessary, and cook until browned, about 10 minutes. Remove and set aside.
2. Add onion to the pan. Cook until soft, about 3 minutes. Add garlic and cook for 1 minute longer.
3. Return chicken to the pan. Add orange juice and raisins. Cover, reduce heat, and simmer until chicken is tender, about 15 minutes. Garnish with almonds.
